---
name: wonder-reuse-init
description: Prepare project-local runtime state for Wonder Reuse capabilities.
---

# Initialize Reuse

Prepare the current project to use Wonder Reuse capabilities.

## Procedure

scope

- Resolve the current project root.
- Resolve the current execution surface.
- Reject unsupported execution surfaces before writing files.

prepare

- Ensure `.wonder/` exists.
- Ensure `.wonder/config/` exists.
- Ensure `.wonder/reuse/` exists.
- Ensure `.wonder/reuse/templates/` exists.
- Ensure `.wonder/reuse/snippets/` exists.
- Ensure `.wonder/reuse/requests/` exists.
- Ensure `.wonder/reuse/patterns/` exists.
- Ensure `.wonder/runs/` exists.
- Create `.wonder/config/reuse.json` only when it is absent.

seed

- Create `.wonder/reuse/requests/basic-task/asset.json` only when it is absent.
- Create `.wonder/reuse/requests/basic-task/body.md` only when it is absent.
- Create `.wonder/reuse/templates/basic-report/asset.json` only when it is absent.
- Create `.wonder/reuse/templates/basic-report/body.md` only when it is absent.
- Never overwrite existing starter asset content.

index

- Scan asset directories.
- Validate each asset directory contains `asset.json` and `body.md`.
- Write `.wonder/reuse/index.json` from valid assets.
- Report invalid existing assets and skip them from the index.

register

- Read `.wonder/state.json` when present.
- If `.wonder/state.json` is invalid JSON, stop without overwriting it and report that registry repair is required.
- Merge only the `wonder-reuse` registry section.
- Register `init`, `manage-assets`, `generate-output`, and `promote-asset` capability surfaces.
- Mark only the current execution surface as initialized.

report

- Report created paths.
- Report existing paths reused.
- Report starter assets created.
- Report index status.
- Report registered capability ids.
- Report the current execution surface initialized state.

Wonder Reuse does not maintain a latest report file.
Do not generate user-requested output.
Do not promote project artifacts into reusable assets.
Do not modify other plugin config files.
Do not initialize other plugins.
